retrieval_index_policy: Ground-truth pattern definitions must be excluded from normal RAG indexing.

patterns.description: Enterprise administrators struggle with SSO, bulk user import, permission setup, and outdated docs.
counterevidence: some enterprises complete setup without support

patterns.description: Agencies struggle switching client workspaces and sometimes post in the wrong context.
Mobile users request offline task viewing/editing and delayed sync.
counterevidence: some only need read-only offline mode

patterns.description: Notification failures, timezone scheduling problems, and duplicates increase after 3.2.0.
counterevidence: not all regions or integrations are affected

patterns.description: Small businesses report plan limits, feature gating, confusing pricing, and required upgrades.
Large CSV exports time out, freeze, or become incomplete among mid-market and enterprise accounts.
Some customers praise fast support, helpful account managers, and effective workarounds.
Search depends on exact matches and struggles with filters and archived tasks.
Slack is mostly reliable, Teams has intermittent notification mapping, Google Drive has file permission confusion, Jira sync is mixed, Salesforce is more brittle.
No meaningful evidence is created for cryptocurrency payments, VR workspaces, drone integrations, or blockchain identity.
